# Changelog

## [0.3.0] — 2026-06-16

### Added — N++ parity (Tiers 1–3)

See [FEATURE_TRACKER.md](FEATURE_TRACKER.md) for the full checklist.

**Tier 1:** file monitoring (all tabs), duplicate tab, calltips, brace matching, multiple windows (`Cmd+Shift+N`)

**Tier 2:** drag-tab-to-split, tab bar modes, encoding auto-detect, read-only, macro export/import, script plugins, spell check, print with line numbers

**Tier 3:** JSON/XML formatters, cloud/session path prefs, large-file threshold wiring, tab pinning, smart highlight, 30 themes

### Changed
- Fold margin colour fix (no white gutter in dark mode)
- Split/clone pane close buttons
- Polished app icon (editor-themed gutter + syntax lines)
- **Help** menu with in-app user guide, shortcuts, and release notes
- GitHub-ready documentation (`docs/USER_GUIDE.md`, `docs/SHORTCUTS.md`)

## [0.2.0] — 2026-06-16

### Added

- Git commit UI, 10 built-in themes, Add Next Occurrence, CLI open, snippets, drag-to-split, auto-completion, UDL

## [0.1.0] — 2026-06-16

First public beta of LexPad.
